variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17612 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17612 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17612 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P776623 Air Filter, Safety | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17612
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P776623 Air Filter, Safety acts as a crucial secondary layer of defense in your air filtration system, capturing fine dust particles that bypass the primary filter. This extra layer of protection helps prevent engine wear and supports consistent performance, especially in dusty or harsh environments. Compact and durable, this safety air filter operates without restricting airflow, complementing the primary filter for comprehensive engine protection. Itâ€™s essential for maintaining clean air intake and maximizing engine lifespan.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25741 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17612
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25741 axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
